title: Chlorophytic
description: Funni Netherite-adjacent toolset that regenerates durability in sunlight
body:
## About

Chlorophyte is a very rare ore found in lush caves, generating between Y:8 and Y:-48. Its ore, when mined with a diamond pickaxe, drops a few Chlorophyte Nuggets, which can either craft Chlorophyte Ingots or Chlorophyte Seeds.

Chlorophyte Seeds can be planted in Clay to make a Chlorophyte Bud, which slowly grows into Chlorophyte Ore. The method for its growth stages is completely random, so I cannot tell you how long it'll take. The bud can be safely broken with your fist or a shovel to retrieve the seeds and some clay, if you decide you would like to relocate it. 

Once it fully grows, mining the ore with a diamond pickaxe will drop 4-8 Clay Balls and 5-8 Chlorophyte Nuggets. It will always drop enough nuggets to craft more seeds, and fortune can be used to get more nuggets.

To actually use Chlorophyte, you must find a Smithing Template with the Chlorophyte upgrade. It can be found in Jungle Temples (66% chance per chest) and Mineshaft Chests (8.3% chance per chest), and duplicated using Jungle Logs and a Chlorophyte Ingot. Once you have the template, you simply upgrade a Diamond tool using it and a Chlorophyte Ingot to get your Chlorophyte tool.

Chlorophyte tools have slightly more durability than Diamond tools, and will regenerate it in direct sunlight. They can also be repaired via the Mending enchantment and in an Anvil by using Chlorophyte Ingots.


## Issues and Feedback

If you find any issues or have any feedback, please mention it in my Discord Server.


## QnA

Q: Will you port to X version or X loader?

A: Most likely not.


Q: Am I free to use this in my modpack?

A: Go for it. No credit needed or anything. 


Q: Can I showcase this mod?

A: Yep, as long as you link back to the mod's Curseforge or Modrinth page.


Q: Will you be updating this project?

A: I'm not sure yet. My schedule is a bit weird at the time of writing this.
